how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Simple process. Clear communication. Clean result from the first message to the finished job.

0.title: Choose a service
0.text: Pick the category that matches your job: TV mounting, plumbing, electrical, drywall, furniture or smart home.

1.title: Send photos or details
1.text: Share 2–4 photos, your location in Valencia and a short description so the job can be reviewed properly.

2.title: Get a clear estimate
2.text: You receive a transparent price range and clear explanation of what affects the final cost.

3.title: Confirm the booking
3.text: Once the scope is clear, the appointment time is confirmed with the right plan and materials in mind.

4.title: Clean professional install
4.text: Measured, aligned and neatly finished work with attention to details, hardware and final presentation.

5.title: Final check and cleanup
5.text: Before leaving, everything is checked with you and the area is left tidy, clean and ready to use.

guides.title: Tips & Guides
guides.subtitle: Short, useful tips to avoid common mistakes and get a cleaner, safer and better-looking result.

0.title: TV mounting height
0.text: The best height depends on sofa distance and screen size. A good rule is to keep the center of the TV close to eye level when seated.

1.title: Choosing anchors
1.text: Plasterboard, brick and concrete all need different hardware. Wrong anchors can make shelves, TVs or mirrors unsafe.

2.title: Cable concealment
2.text: Raceway is the fastest clean-looking option. In-wall routing is only suitable when the wall type allows it safely.

3.title: Before drilling the wall
3.text: Always confirm wall material, cable routes and final height before drilling. Small planning mistakes create expensive fixes later.

4.title: Mirror positioning
4.text: Bathroom and hallway mirrors should be centered carefully and placed at a height that feels balanced for everyday use.

5.title: Shelf spacing
5.text: Good shelf installation is not only about level mounting. Spacing, symmetry and surrounding furniture matter too.

6.title: Small plumbing upgrades
6.text: Replacing faucets, shower heads and visible fittings can improve the feel of a kitchen or bathroom without full renovation.

7.title: Light fixture planning
7.text: Before replacing a light, check compatibility, mounting base and room purpose to get both practical lighting and clean appearance.

8.title: Bundle small jobs together
8.text: The most efficient approach is often grouping several small tasks into one visit instead of booking each issue separately.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions.

0.a: THEVULGO primarily serves Valencia and nearby areas. Requests outside the city may still be accepted depending on distance and schedule — simply share your location to confirm availability.

1.q: Can you provide a price before the visit?
1.a: In most cases, yes. After reviewing photos and a short description, THEVULGO can provide an estimated price range. Final pricing is confirmed once the full scope and wall conditions are verified.

2.q: How quickly can the service be scheduled?
2.a: Many standard jobs can be scheduled the same day or next day depending on availability. Clients always receive a clear confirmation window before the appointment is finalized.

3.q: Do you bring professional tools and hardware?
3.a: Yes. THEVULGO arrives fully equipped with professional tools and standard mounting hardware. If specialized anchors or materials are required, suitable options are discussed before installation.

4.q: Do you handle complex electrical rewiring?
4.a: No. THEVULGO performs basic electrical tasks such as light fixtures, switches, sockets, and clean mounting work. Complex rewiring must be completed by a licensed electrician.

5.q: Is it possible to book without an on-site inspection?
5.a: Yes. Many installations can be confirmed remotely using photos and measurements. If any technical details remain unclear, additional information will be requested before confirming the booking.

6.q: What information is required to get started?
6.a: To provide an accurate quote, THEVULGO typically requires 2–4 photos of the area, the service requested, your location in Valencia, and your preferred time window.

7.q: Is cleanup included after the job?
7.a: Absolutely. Clean workmanship is a core standard of THEVULGO. The work area is left tidy, and minor debris is removed after installation.
